name: agent-skills
description: Production-grade capability skills for AI coding agents. Six battle-tested skills: cloudflare-dns (migrate DNS from any registrar to Cloudflare with bulk record import and registrar nameserver flip), namecheap-dns (manage Namecheap DNS records via the XML API — handles IP-allowlist and wholesale-replace quirks), fly-to-aws-migration (end-to-end Fly.io → AWS migration playbook covering Postgres → Aurora, Machines → ECS Fargate, secrets, DNS cutover), deep-research (parallel multi-source research across X, Reddit, HackerNews, GitHub, Polymarket, YouTube, and Exa neural search), terminal-poster (dense retro-cyberpunk viral infographics via Nano Banana Pro), and clean-sweep (autonomous multi-agent issue clean-sweep — one-PR-per-finding pipeline on the Orca runtime). MIT licensed.
